Thirsty.title: Dehydrated
Thirsty.description: I am so thirsty. I wish there was something to drink around here.

Starving.title: Starving
Starving.description: I am starving. I wish there was something to eat around here.

Exhausted.title: Exhausted
Exhausted.description: So so tired, I can hardly keep my eyes open.

CrewMemberDied.title: Crew member died
CrewMemberDied.description: A member of the crew has died. Maybe it will be me next time.

CaptainDied.title: Captain died
CaptainDied.description: The cap recently died. This is a huge loss for all of us.

SoldCrewMember.title: A crew member was sold
SoldCrewMember.description: We recently sold a crew member. Who knows what will happen to them now.

LowOxygen.title: Low Oxygen
LowOxygen.description: I am really struggling to breath.

Optimistic.title: Optimistic
Optimistic.description: Things aren't great, but at least I'm alive. I'm sure things could be much worse.

AteOnFloor.title: Eaten on the floor
AteOnFloor.description: It sucks having to eat on the floor. I wish I had a table to eat at.

SleptOnFloor.title: Slept on the floor
SleptOnFloor.description: I really wish I had a bed to sleep in. It sucks sleeping on the floor.

SleptInComfyBed.title: Slept in comfy bed
SleptInComfyBed.description: Wow, my bed is so comfy. I could stay in it all day.

UnsatisfiedWithRole.title: Unsatisfied with given role
UnsatisfiedWithRole.description: I truly believe I deserve a higher-ranking role than the one I have been given.

SatisfiedWithRole.title: Satisfied with given role
SatisfiedWithRole.description: I am really happy with the role I have been given.

AteHumanMeatCannibal.title: I ate some human meat
AteHumanMeatCannibal.description: That human meat I ate tasted so good!

AteHumanMeat.title: I ate some human meat
AteHumanMeat.description: I had to eat some human meat. I'm such a terrible person.

AteHumanMeatIngredientCannibal.title: I ate some human meat
AteHumanMeatIngredientCannibal.description: That human meat I ate tasted so good!

AteHumanMeatIngredient.title: I ate some human meat
AteHumanMeatIngredient.description: I had to eat some human meat. I'm such a terrible person.

Depressed.title: Depressed
Depressed.description: My life sucks and I hate it!

HadFun.title: Had fun
HadFun.description: Wow, that was so much fun!

DislikeDarkness.title: Fear of darkness
DislikeDarkness.description: I hate being in the dark. It's terrifying.

LikeDarkness.title: Loves darkness
LikeDarkness.description: I love spending time in the dark.

NoCaptain.title: No captain
NoCaptain.description: How can we expect a ship to run smoothly without a captain?

HasCaptain.title: Has captain
HasCaptain.description: I'm sure this ship will run much better now we have a good captain.

LostCaptain.title: Lost captain
LostCaptain.description: How did we manage to lose our captain? This is a disaster.

HasNoCaptainsChair.title: No captain's chair
HasNoCaptainsChair.description: I really need to get myself one of those captain's chairs.

LowReserves.title: Low reserves
LowReserves.description: It's worrying that we have low food and water reserves on the ship.

Content.title: Content
Content.description: I am well-hydrated and have food in my belly. Everything seems to be going ok, at least for now.

UncomfortableInSpaceSuit.title: Uncomfortable space gear
UncomfortableInSpaceSuit.description: It would be nice to get out of this space gear for just a few hours.

SleptInHeat.title: Slept in heat
SleptInHeat.description: I was way too hot whilst sleeping.

SleptInCosyBed.title: Slept in cosy bed
SleptInCosyBed.description: My bed was nice and cosy.

Rescued.title: Rescued
Rescued.description: I was rescued! What a relief, I feel lucky to be alive.

NoPrivacy.title: Has no privacy
NoPrivacy.description: I have no personal space assigned to me.

NearDeath.title: Has a life threatening condition
NearDeath.description: Am I going to die soon?

Cramped.title: Cramped
Cramped.description: I can hardly move in this place.

Spacious.title: Spacious
Spacious.description: There is plenty of room here for all of us.

CleanShip.title: Clean ship
CleanShip.description: It feels good to be on such a clean ship.

DirtyShip.title: Dirty ship
DirtyShip.description: This ship is filthy and disgusting.

DeadBodyNearby.title: Dead body nearby
DeadBodyNearby.description: That dead body is making me feel uneasy.
